footer_admin_desc: Pamahalaan ang paghahatid, mga ulat, at progreso ng mga mag-aaral mula sa isang workspace.
footer_learner_desc: Panatilihin ang iyong iskedyul, mga pagsubok, at mga paparating na pagsusulit sa isang lugar.
login_dev_admin_db_error: Hindi malikha ang dev admin dahil mayroon nang mga gumagamit ang database na ito.
login_learner_bootstrap_error: Nabigo ang learner bootstrap dahil gumagamit ang database na ito ng ibang admin account.
signup_hero_note: Gumawa ng iyong learner account nang isang beses, pagkatapos ay pamahalaan ang mga pagsusulit, iskedyul, at resulta mula sa parehong workspace.
signup_status_error: Hindi ma-verify ang availability ng self-registration ngayon. Pakisubukang muli mamaya.
signup_helper_text: Gamitin ang email at learner ID na inaasahan ng iyong institusyon. Ang mga password ay dapat hindi bababa sa 8 character.
signup_retry_check: Subukang muli ang pagsuri ng availability
signup_success: Nalikha ang account! Maaari ka nang mag-log in.
forgot_subtitle: Ilagay ang iyong email para makatanggap ng reset link.
forgot_success: Kung umiiral ang email, naipadala na ang reset link.
forgot_error: Error sa pagpapadala ng reset email
reset_pwd_success: Matagumpay ang pag-reset ng password. Maaari ka nang mag-log in.
validation_password_min_length: Ang password ay dapat hindi bababa sa 8 character.
home_overview_text: Here is an overview of your learning progress, upcoming schedule, and latest results.
home_dashboard_unavailable: Dashboard data is temporarily unavailable. You can still open your tests and retry.
home_active_attempts_msg: active attempts that can be resumed right away.
home_no_active_attempts_msg: No live attempt is waiting on you right now. Use this time to review upcoming tests or recent results.

home_next_assignment_auto: Your next assignment will appear here automatically.
home_no_recent_attempts_text: Your completed attempts will show up here once you start taking tests.

exams_what_opens_next_text: Instructions, readiness checks, identity verification, and the monitored test flow.
exams_newest_pinned: Newest available test is pinned first.
attempts_no_attempts_yet: No attempts yet. Take a test to get started.
result_opened_from_manage_text: This result was opened from the admin test review workflow. Use the back action below to return to the same test tab.
result_awaiting_review_text: Your attempt was submitted successfully. An instructor or admin still needs to review at least one manually graded answer before the final score is published.
result_after_grading_text: Detailed answer review and final result reporting will appear after grading is complete.
result_no_proctoring_data: No proctoring data was recorded for this attempt.
result_no_alert_events: No alert events were recorded for this attempt.
result_manual_review_workflow_text: Review manually graded answers, save awarded points question by question, then finalize to publish the updated score.
result_no_answer_review: No answer review is available for this attempt.

result_open_report_error: Unable to open the exam report.

result_enter_points_error: Enter the awarded points before saving this review.
result_review_saved_notice: Manual review points saved. Finalize the review to publish the updated score.

result_review_finalized_notice: Attempt review finalized and score published.

instructions_invalid_link: Hindi valid ang link ng pagsusulit. Bumalik sa listahan ng mga pagsusulit at subukan ulit.
instructions_parse_error: Nabigong i-parse ang data ng pagsusulit. Maaaring mali ang configuration ng pagsusulit.
instructions_load_error: Nabigong i-load ang mga detalye ng pagsusulit.
instructions_could_not_prepare: Hindi maihanda ang pagsusulit na ito
instructions_review_guidance: Suriin ang gabay sa ibaba bago magsimula upang makapagpatuloy ang pagsubok nang walang abala.
instructions_stable_connection: Siguraduhing may matatag na koneksyon sa internet
instructions_close_tabs: Isara ang lahat ng ibang browser tab at application
instructions_id_ready: Ihanda ang iyong ID para sa pagpapatunay ng pagkakakilanlan
instructions_allow_cam_mic_screen: Payagan ang camera, microphone, at buong-screen sharing kapag hiniling
instructions_allow_cam_mic: Payagan ang access sa camera at microphone kapag hiniling
instructions_no_navigate_away: Huwag umalis sa pahina ng pagsusulit
instructions_system_check_helper: Tumatakbo ang mga pagsusuri sa camera, microphone, at device bago ka makapagpatuloy.
instructions_identity_check_helper: Kailangan ang pagkuha ng pagkakakilanlan bago pumasok sa screen ng mga patakaran.
instructions_rules_helper: Maaari kang dumiretso sa pag-apruba ng mga patakaran.
instructions_cam_mic_screen_requested: Hihilingin ang camera, microphone, at buong-screen sharing.
instructions_cam_mic_requested: Hihilingin ang mga pahintulot sa camera at microphone.
instructions_no_proctoring: Walang naka-enable na pagsusuri ng pagbabantay para sa pagsusulit na ito.
instructions_req_identity: Pagpapatunay ng pagkakakilanlan bago ang mga patakaran
instructions_req_rules: Pag-apruba ng mga patakaran bago magsimula
instructions_proctored_notice: May bantay ang pagsusulit na ito.
instructions_cam_mic_monitored: Masusubaybayan ang iyong camera at microphone.
instructions_quiet_environment: Siguraduhing nasa tahimik at maliwanag na kapaligiran ka.
rules_subtitle: Pakibasa at tanggapin ang mga sumusunod na patakaran bago magsimula
rules_no_external_resources: Huwag gumamit ng anumang panlabas na mapagkukunan, libro, o mga tala sa pagsusulit.
rules_no_communication: Huwag makipag-usap sa iba sa panahon ng pagsusulit.
rules_face_visible: Panatilihing nakikita ang iyong mukha sa camera sa lahat ng oras.
rules_no_mobile: Huwag gumamit ng mobile phone o anumang ibang elektronikong device.
rules_stay_fullscreen: Manatili sa fullscreen mode sa buong pagsusulit.
rules_no_navigate_away: Huwag umalis sa window ng pagsusulit.
rules_suspicious_flagged: Anumang kahina-hinalang gawi ay ita-tag at ire-record.
rules_violations_termination: Ang mga paglabag ay maaaring magresulta sa pagwawakas ng pagsusulit o pagkakansela ng marka.
rules_invalid_link: Hindi valid ang link ng pagsusulit. Bumalik sa listahan at subukan ulit.
rules_load_error: Nabigong i-load ang mga patakaran at kinakailangan ng pagsusulit. Subukan ulit bago magsimula.
rules_system_check_passed: Naipasa na ng browser session na ito ang mga kinakailangang pagsusuri ng device.
rules_system_check_pending: Bumalik sa pagsusuri ng sistema bago pumasok sa live na pagsubok.
rules_camera_helper: Ire-record ka ng iyong camera sa panahon ng pagsusulit.
rules_mic_helper: Masusubaybayan ang iyong microphone para sa audio sa panahon ng pagsusulit.
rules_screen_helper: Kailangang i-share ang buong screen mo bago magsimula ang live na pagsubok. Kung huminto ang pag-share, hihilingin ulit.
rules_fullscreen_helper: Tatakbo ang pagsusulit sa fullscreen mode. Ang paglabas sa fullscreen ay ita-tag.
rules_identity_helper: Sinusuri ang pagpapatunay ng pagkakakilanlan bago ka pumasok sa pagsubok.
rules_system_check_warning: Hindi pa nakumpleto ang pagsusuri ng sistema sa browser session na ito. Bumalik sa screen ng mga pagsusuri bago simulan ang live na pagsubok.
rules_unavailable: Hindi available ang mga patakaran hangga't hindi matagumpay na na-load ang configuration ng pagsusulit.
rules_agree_label: Nabasa ko at sumasang-ayon ako sa lahat ng patakaran ng pagsusulit at pumapayag sa pagsubaybay na inilarawan sa itaas
rules_complete_system_check_first: Kumpletuhin muna ang pagsusuri ng sistema
rules_complete_system_check: Kumpletuhin ang pagsusuri ng sistema sa browser session na ito bago simulan ang pagsusulit.
rules_not_ready: Hindi pa handa ang mga patakaran ng pagsusulit. I-reload ang mga patakaran bago magsimula.
rules_must_accept: Kailangan mong tanggapin ang mga patakaran bago magsimula.
rules_attempt_error: Nabigong gumawa o makahanap ng aktibong pagsubok para sa pagsusulit na ito.
rules_fullscreen_required: Kailangan ang fullscreen bago magsimula ang pagsusulit. Pakipayagan ang fullscreen at subukan ulit.
syscheck_subtitle: Kailangan naming i-verify na natutugunan ng iyong sistema ang mga kinakailangan
syscheck_mic_release_error: Hindi malinis na naipalabas ang monitor ng microphone. I-refresh ang pahina kung hindi available ang mic.
syscheck_entire_screen_error: Kailangan mong i-share ang buong screen mo, hindi isang window o browser tab.
syscheck_screen_denied: Tinanggihan ang screen sharing. I-share ang buong screen mo para makapagpatuloy.
syscheck_screen_start_error: Hindi nasimulan ang screen sharing. Subukan ulit.
syscheck_invalid_link: Hindi valid ang link ng pagsusulit. Bumalik sa listahan at subukan ulit.
syscheck_load_config_error: Nabigong i-load ang configuration ng pagsusulit. Paki-refresh at subukan ulit.
syscheck_not_required: Hindi kinakailangan para sa pagsusulit na ito.
syscheck_allow_camera: Pakipayagan ang access sa camera at i-refresh.
syscheck_speak_confirm: Magsalita para i-confirm ang antas ng microphone.
syscheck_share_screen_hint: I-share ngayon ang buong screen mo para masimulan ang live na pagsubok nang walang ibang pahintulot na hihilingin.
syscheck_fullscreen_required: Kinakailangan ang fullscreen para sa pagsusulit na ito.
verify_subtitle: Kumuha ng live selfie at magbigay ng malinaw na larawan ng ID
verify_identity_required_helper: Kinakailangan ang selfie at katibayan ng ID bago makapagpatuloy ang mag-aaral.
verify_identity_skipped_helper: Nilalaktawan ng pagsusulit na ito ang pagpapatunay ng pagkakakilanlan.
verify_camera_required_helper: Kinakailangan ang live camera access para sa iyong selfie at pagbabantay.
verify_camera_optional_helper: Kinakailangan ang camera access para sa iyong selfie.
verify_lighting_required_helper: Lumipat sa mas maliwanag na ilaw kung mababa pa rin ang marka.
verify_lighting_disabled_helper: Hindi pinagana ang pagtanggi sa mababang ilaw para sa pagsusulit na ito.
verify_id_typed_helper: Ang iyong ini-type na numero ng ID ay ipapadala kasama ng iyong mga larawan.
verify_id_auto_helper: Kung hindi awtomatikong natuklas ang numero ng ID, maaaring manu-manong i-type ng mag-aaral.
verify_camera_access_error: Kinakailangan ang camera access para sa pagpapatunay ng pagkakakilanlan. Pakipayagan ang access at i-reload.
verify_invalid_link: Hindi valid ang link ng pagsusulit. Bumalik sa listahan at subukan ulit.
verify_load_requirements_error: Nabigong i-load ang mga kinakailangan para sa pagpapatunay. Paki-refresh at subukan ulit.
verify_loading_requirements: Naglo-load ng mga kinakailangan para sa pagpapatunay...
verify_fullscreen_picker_warning: Ang pagbukas ng file picker ng browser ay maaaring maglabas sa fullscreen. Bumalik sa fullscreen bago magpatuloy.
verify_reload_requirements: I-reload ang mga kinakailangan para sa pagpapatunay
verify_camera_not_ready: Hindi pa handa ang camera. Pakipayagan ang access at subukan ulit.
verify_invalid_image: Paki-upload ng valid na larawan ng ID.
verify_load_id_error: Nabigong i-load ang larawan ng ID.
verify_config_not_loaded: Hindi ma-verify ang pagkakakilanlan dahil hindi pa na-load ang mga kinakailangan ng pagsusulit.
verify_selfie_id_required: Kumuha muna ng live selfie at ibigay ang larawan ng iyong ID.
verify_verification_failed: Nabigo ang pagpapatunay. Paki-ayos ang mga isyu sa ibaba at subukan ulit.
verify_identity_failed: Nabigong ma-verify ang pagkakakilanlan. Pakikuha ulit ang larawan at subukan ulit.
verify_capture_selfie_aria: Kumuha ng selfie mula sa live camera
verify_capture_id_aria: Kumuha ng larawan ng ID mula sa live camera
verify_camera_helper: Kinakailangan ang camera access para sa iyong selfie. Pakipayagan ang access at i-reload ang pahina.
verify_id_manual_hint: Kung hindi natuklas ang numero ng ID mula sa larawan, maaari mo itong i-type dito.
verify_retake_photos: Kumuha ulit ng mga larawan ng pagkakakilanlan
verify_reason_mic_failed: Kinakailangan ang microphone access. Pakipayagan ang access at subukan ulit.
verify_reason_camera_failed: Kinakailangan ang camera access. Pakipayagan ang access at subukan ulit.
verify_reason_low_lighting: Masyadong madilim ang iyong larawan. Lumipat sa mas maliwanag na lugar at kumuha ulit.
verify_reason_face_mismatch: Hindi tumutugma ang iyong selfie sa mukha sa iyong ID. Siguraduhing malinaw ang parehong larawan at subukan ulit.
verify_reason_id_text_missing: Hindi namin nabasa ang iyong numero ng ID. Paki-type sa field sa ibaba.
verify_reason_ocr_unavailable: Paki-type ang iyong numero ng ID sa field sa ibaba.
verify_reason_id_too_similar: Ang larawan ng ID ay mukhang kapareho ng iyong selfie. Pakikuha ng larawan ng iyong totoong ID card.
verify_reason_id_looks_selfie: Pakikuha ng larawan ng iyong ID card, hindi ng iyong mukha.
verify_reason_id_not_detected: Hindi namin natuklas ang iyong ID card. Siguraduhing buong card ay nakikita at maliwanag.
not_found_message: Hindi mahanap ang pahina na hinahanap mo.
access_denied_body: Walang pahintulot ang iyong account na buksan ang pahinang ito.
surveys_no_surveys: Walang available na survey sa ngayon.
surveys_already_submitted: Naipadala mo na ang survey na ito.
surveys_no_questions: Wala pang mga tanong ang survey na ito.
training_modules_loaded: Mga module na naka-load sa mga course
training_tests_attached: Mga test na naka-attach sa mga course module
training_search_placeholder: Maghanap ng course, module, o test...
training_load_error: Hindi na-load ang mga training course.
training_partial_notice: Ilang detalye ng training ay pansamantalang hindi available. Ang impormasyon ng course ay ipinapakita ngunit ang mga link ng module o test ay maaaring hindi kumpleto.
training_no_match: Walang course na tumutugma sa kasalukuyang paghahanap.
training_clear_search_hint: I-clear ang paghahanap para ibalik ang mga na-load na course, module, at test.
training_assigned_appear: Ang mga naka-assign na training course ay lalabas dito kapag na-publish na sa iyong account.
training_no_description: Walang ibinigay na paglalarawan ng course.
training_no_modules: Walang available na module para sa course na ito ngayon.
proctor_upload_processing: Tapos na ang upload. Nagpo-proseso pa ng huling video. Huwag isara ang pahinang ito.
proctor_upload_in_progress: Inu-upload ang iyong mga proctoring recording bago i-submit. Huwag isara ang pahinang ito.
proctor_screen_share_message: Kailangan mong i-share ang buong screen mo sa buong tagal ng exam. Ire-record at mamo-monitor ang iyong screen.
proctor_share_to_continue: I-share ang iyong screen para magpatuloy
proctor_no_questions: Walang available na tanong para sa attempt na ito.
proctor_back_to_attempts: Bumalik sa listahan ng mga attempt
proctor_recording_hint: Ang mga naka-save na recording ay lalabas pagkatapos i-submit sa Manage Tests - Proctoring - Video
proctor_autosave_pending: Auto-save: May mga pending na pagbabago
proctor_all_answered: Lahat ng tanong ay may naka-record na sagot.
proctor_once_submitted: Kapag na-submit, i-lo-lock ang attempt na ito at ipapadala para sa review.
admin_dash_subtitle: Kalusugan ng platform, pagsubaybay sa panganib, at analytics ng pagganap
admin_dash_failed_load: Nabigong i-load ang data ng dashboard.
admin_dash_partial_load: Hindi na-load ang ilang panel. I-refresh.
admin_dash_hero_subtitle: Subaybayan ang paglago ng platform at panganib sa proktoring.
admin_exams_adjust_filters: Ayusin ang mga filter para palawakin ang listahan.
admin_exams_popup_blocked: Na-block ang popup. Payagan ang pop-up.
admin_manage_menu_instructions: Mga setting ng dialog ng mga tagubilin sa pagsusulit
admin_manage_menu_retake: Mga setting ng pag-pause, retake, at reschedule
admin_manage_menu_result_validity: Mga setting ng validity ng resulta
admin_manage_menu_personal_report: Mga setting ng personal na ulat
admin_manage_err_status_change: Hindi mababago ang status ng pagsusulit.
admin_manage_err_load_data: Nabigong i-load ang data ng pagsusulit.
admin_manage_err_pause_duration: Ang tagal ng pag-pause ay dapat positibong bilang ng mga minuto.
admin_manage_err_retake_cooldown: Ang retake cooldown ay dapat zero o mas mataas.
admin_manage_err_validity_days: Ang result validity days ay dapat positibong bilang.
admin_manage_err_external_json: Invalid na JSON sa external attributes.
admin_manage_err_external_object: Ang external attributes ay dapat JSON object.
admin_manage_translation_updated: Na-update ang pagsasalin. I-save ang mga setting para ma-persist.
admin_manage_translation_removed: Tinanggal ang pagsasalin mula sa draft na ito.
admin_manage_err_translation_lang: Pumili ng wika at magdagdag ng kahit isang na-translate na field.
admin_manage_err_translation_duplicate: May pagsasalin na para sa wikang ito.
admin_manage_attachment_updated: Na-update ang attachment. I-save ang mga setting para ma-persist.
admin_manage_attachment_removed: Tinanggal ang attachment mula sa draft na ito.
admin_manage_coupon_removed: Tinanggal ang kupon mula sa draft na ito.
admin_manage_err_coupon_count: Ang bilang ng kupon ay dapat nasa pagitan ng 1 at 100.
admin_manage_err_coupon_amount: Ang halaga ng kupon ay dapat mas mataas sa 0.
admin_manage_err_coupon_percentage: Ang percentage discount ay hindi dapat lumampas sa 100.
admin_manage_cert_cleared: Tinanggal ang sertipiko mula sa draft na ito.
admin_manage_err_no_cert_sources: Walang nahanap na ibang pagsusulit na may certificate settings.
admin_manage_err_cert_sources: Nabigong i-load ang mga source ng sertipiko.
admin_manage_err_choose_cert: Pumili ng pagsusulit na may valid na certificate configuration.
admin_manage_category_created: Nagawa ang kategorya at na-assign sa draft na ito ng pagsusulit.
admin_wizard_detector_face_desc: Detect presence and count of faces
admin_wizard_detector_head_desc: Detect sustained head turns and posture changes
admin_wizard_req_identity_desc: Require selfie and ID checks before the learner enters the attempt.
admin_wizard_req_camera_desc: Block the journey if the camera is unavailable.
admin_wizard_req_mic_desc: Block the journey if the microphone is unavailable.
admin_wizard_req_lighting_desc: Require the webcam feed to pass the minimum lighting score.
admin_wizard_req_fullscreen_desc: Require fullscreen during the active attempt.
admin_wizard_req_tab_desc: Track focus loss, tab switches, and hidden pages.
admin_wizard_req_clipboard_desc: Disable copy and paste shortcuts during the attempt.
admin_wizard_req_screen_desc: Request screen share and save a screen recording with timed snapshots for later review.
admin_wizard_pcg_identity_desc: Tune how strict the journey checks are before the learner can start.
admin_wizard_pcg_attention_desc: Control how aggressively gaze, posture, speech, and mouth movement are flagged.
admin_wizard_pcg_enforcement_desc: Define when repeated violations should escalate to an automatic submission.
admin_wizard_pcg_capture_desc: Control how often visual/audio evidence is sampled and sent for analysis.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_absence_desc: Lower is stricter. Missing faces trigger alerts sooner.
admin_wizard_ctrl_lighting_min_desc: Higher is stricter. Darker rooms will fail the precheck.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_verify_id_desc: Lower is stricter. Tightens selfie-to-ID matching.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_verify_desc: Lower is stricter. Tightens ongoing face verification.
admin_wizard_ctrl_object_conf_desc: Higher is stricter. Require stronger model confidence before flagging objects.
admin_wizard_ctrl_multi_face_area_desc: Higher is stricter about ignoring tiny false-positive faces before raising a multiple-face alert.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_cover_hard_desc: Frames darker than this trigger an immediate camera-covered streak.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_cover_soft_desc: Dark flat frames below this luma can trigger a softer camera-covered streak.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_stddev_desc: Lower values require the frame to be flatter before it counts as softly covered.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_hard_frames_desc: How many fully blocked frames are needed before warning immediately.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_soft_frames_desc: How many dark flat frames are needed before warning for a covered camera.
admin_wizard_ctrl_eye_angle_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller gaze drift triggers alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_eye_frames_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer frames are needed before flagging.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_yaw_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller side turns count as suspicious.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_pitch_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller up/down head motion is flagged.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_frames_desc: Lower is stricter. Head pose changes trigger sooner.
admin_wizard_ctrl_mouth_thresh_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller mouth motion can trigger talking alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_rms_desc: Lower is stricter. Quieter noise can trigger audio alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_chunks_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer noisy chunks are needed before alerting.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_chunks_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer speech-like chunks are needed before the anomaly path fires.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_rms_desc: Raise this to ignore quieter background noise when speech detection is enabled.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_mult_desc: Higher values require speech-like audio to stand out more clearly above the rolling baseline.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_window_desc: How many recent chunks are considered when detecting sustained audio anomalies.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_tab_desc: Lower is stricter. The attempt can auto-submit after fewer focus losses.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_alerts_desc: Auto-submit after this many alerts are logged.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_score_desc: Auto-submit after the weighted violation score crosses this number.
admin_wizard_ctrl_consec_frames_desc: Fallback consecutive frame count shared by sustained detectors.
admin_wizard_ctrl_frame_interval_desc: Higher saves bandwidth. Lower gives denser monitoring.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_chunk_desc: Higher sends fewer but larger audio chunks.
admin_wizard_ctrl_screenshot_desc: Only used when screen recording is enabled.
admin_wizard_alert_fullscreen_exit_desc: Learner exits fullscreen during the attempt.
admin_wizard_alert_tab_switch_desc: Browser loses focus because the learner switched tabs or apps.
admin_wizard_alert_focus_loss_desc: The test window loses focus or becomes hidden.
admin_wizard_alert_camera_covered_desc: The webcam feed is blocked or too dark.
admin_wizard_alert_no_face_desc: The learner moves out of frame for too long.
admin_wizard_alert_multiple_faces_desc: More than one face appears in the camera view.
admin_wizard_alert_face_mismatch_desc: Live face does not match the verified identity sample.
admin_wizard_alert_loud_audio_desc: Sudden loud noise or speech is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_audio_anomaly_desc: Repeated suspicious audio activity is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_forbidden_obj_desc: Phone, book, or other forbidden object is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_eye_movement_desc: Gaze deviates away from the screen for too long.
admin_wizard_alert_head_pose_desc: The learner turns away or changes head pose suspiciously.
admin_wizard_alert_mouth_movement_desc: Talking or sustained mouth movement is detected.
admin_wizard_action_flag_helper: Creates a proctoring escalation event for admins to review later.
admin_wizard_action_warn_helper: Shows a live warning to the learner and keeps the exam running.
admin_wizard_action_submit_helper: Immediately submits the exam when the rule threshold is reached.
admin_wizard_val_course_title_required: Enter a course title before creating one.
admin_wizard_val_course_create_failed: Failed to create the course. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_setup_partial: Some setup data failed to load. The wizard is still usable with the data that is available.
admin_wizard_val_setup_failed: Failed to load setup data. Retry the page to continue.
admin_wizard_val_code_length: External code / ID must be between 6 and 12 characters.
admin_wizard_val_select_module: Select or create a module before continuing.
admin_wizard_val_generator_count: Please set a total question count for the generator.
admin_wizard_val_generator_mix: Generator difficulty mix must total exactly 100%.
admin_wizard_val_time_limit: Provide a valid time limit or enable unlimited time.
admin_wizard_val_passing_score: Passing score must be between 0 and 100.
admin_wizard_val_max_attempts: Max attempts must be at least 1.
admin_wizard_val_neg_marking: Negative marking must be zero or higher.
admin_wizard_val_cert_title: Enter a certificate title or disable certificates.
admin_wizard_val_cert_signer: Enter a certificate signer or disable certificates.
admin_wizard_val_restricted_schedule: Restricted assignments require a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_val_save_assignments: Save learner assignment changes before continuing.
admin_wizard_val_add_question: Add at least one question before publishing.
admin_wizard_val_locked: Published and archived tests must be edited from Manage Tests.
admin_wizard_val_module_failed: Could not create module. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_save_failed: Hindi ma-save. Pakisuri ang mga kinakailangang field at subukang muli.
admin_wizard_val_pool_empty: This pool has no questions yet. Open the pool and add questions before seeding this test.
admin_wizard_val_pool_seed_failed: Failed to seed questions from pool.
admin_wizard_val_ai_topic_required: Enter a topic for AI generation.
admin_wizard_val_schedule_required: Restricted access requires a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_val_assign_failed: Failed to assign sessions. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_publish_failed: Could not save. Please add questions and try again.
admin_wizard_val_autosave_failed: Autosave failed. Check your connection and try again.
admin_wizard_val_create_test_failed: Could not create the test yet. Please check required fields and try again.
admin_wizard_val_no_learners_match: None of the pasted learners matched the current learner list.
admin_wizard_val_paste_first: Paste learner IDs, emails, or user IDs first.
admin_wizard_val_no_learners: There are no learners available to assign yet.
admin_wizard_val_no_search_match: No learners match the current search.
admin_wizard_card_questions_needed: Questions still need to be added
admin_wizard_review_add_first: Add at least one question first
admin_wizard_review_next_phase_desc: Assign learners and schedule access in Step 7
admin_wizard_description_placeholder: Describe the test purpose, scope, and any special instructions...
admin_wizard_no_courses_hint: No courses yet. Create one here and the wizard will keep going.
admin_wizard_no_modules_hint: No modules in this course. The wizard will create Module 1 automatically.
admin_wizard_create_course_hint: This creates a draft course and its first module without leaving the wizard.
admin_wizard_course_desc_placeholder: Optional description for the training course...
admin_wizard_method_manual_desc: Pick questions from pools or create them manually. Define exactly which questions appear in each test version.
admin_wizard_method_generator_desc: Let the system automatically select questions based on your criteria. Creates unique test versions per candidate.
admin_wizard_ai_hint: Enter a topic and let the model draft questions, then we save them into this test.
admin_wizard_mix_hint: Totals can exceed or fall below 100. They are normalized during generation.
admin_wizard_categories_hint: Leave empty to allow all categories.
admin_wizard_pools_hint: If none selected, generator can draw from any pool.
admin_wizard_prevent_reuse: Prevent reusing same question across versions
admin_wizard_proctoring_settings: Mga Setting ng Pagmamanman at Pagsusulit
admin_wizard_proctoring_intro: This is the dedicated proctoring phase. Configure delivery rules, AI monitoring, special accommodations, and live candidate controls here before you publish.
admin_wizard_escalate_hint: Choose which alert matters, how many repeats are allowed, what severity gets logged, and what the exam should do when the threshold is reached.
admin_wizard_no_rules: No custom alert rules yet. The global auto-submit thresholds still apply until you add a rule here.
admin_wizard_trigger_hint: Count of matching alerts before this rule fires.
admin_wizard_severity_hint: Severity stored on the escalation event for review and reporting.
admin_wizard_message_placeholder: Optional custom message shown when this rule fires
admin_wizard_enable_above: Enable it above or the rule will never fire.
admin_wizard_questions_intro: Add questions directly or seed from a question pool.
admin_wizard_pool_available: question(s) available in this pool for seeding.
admin_wizard_pool_empty_hint: This pool is empty. Open Question Pools and add questions before seeding.
admin_wizard_creating_test: Creating the test so you can add questions...
admin_wizard_hang_tight: Hang tight while we create the test so you can start adding questions right away.
admin_wizard_passing_hint_suffix: % on the entire test to pass.
admin_wizard_enable_neg_marking: Enable negative marking for wrong answers
admin_wizard_show_final_score: Show final score to candidate after submission
admin_wizard_conduct_hint: These map to runtime enforcement: fullscreen prompts, visibility/tab pings, optional screen grabs, and clipboard locking.
admin_wizard_cert_after_review: Learners can download the certificate only after an admin or instructor approves it from Attempt Analysis.
admin_wizard_cert_positive_proctoring: Medium and high proctoring alerts will block certificate download.
admin_wizard_cert_after_pass: The certificate becomes available as soon as the learner passes.
admin_wizard_sessions_intro: Assign this test to learners with a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_save_first: Save the test first (go back and advance through steps).
admin_wizard_restricted_warning: Restricted access requires a scheduled date and time before assignments can be saved.
admin_wizard_save_warning: Save assignments to persist the current learner selection before continuing.
admin_wizard_assigned_preselected: Existing assigned learners are preselected. Save assignments to update their access mode or scheduled time.
admin_wizard_bulk_hint: Paste learner IDs, emails, or internal IDs separated by commas or new lines.
admin_wizard_save_intro: Choose the initial status for this test. You can change it later from the Manage Tests page.
admin_wizard_publish_warning: Drafts can be saved without questions. Publishing still requires at least one question.
